profile.name: Ravi Teja A
profile.title: Analytics Engineer
profile.bio: Data and analytics professional with 4+ years of experience in marketing and development analytics, performance measurement, and data-driven storytelling. I build scalable analytics frameworks, self-service dashboards in Tableau and Power BI, and experimentation/test-and-learn measurement methodologies. My work spans lifecycle marketing analytics, email and SMS/text performance measurement, CRM platforms including Salesforce Marketing Cloud, and SQL-based data analysis across Snowflake, Redshift, and BigQuery. I translate complex analytical insights into clear, actionable recommendations for both technical and non-technical stakeholders, driving measurable improvements in fundraising and marketing channel performance.
